b_issues: Provides less complete milestone detail. One snippet also appears truncated/awkwardly phrased ('17 of the Seahawks' five field goals were the most made...'), which reduces clarity.
reasoning: A better equips an LLM to answer the query correctly because it directly contains the needed kicking stats and the points milestone in one place: Myers made a Super Bowl-record five field goals, scored 17 points with two extra points, and finished with 206 total points, breaking LaDainian Tomlinson's 198-point mark. Those facts align with the anchor and come from reliable sources including NFL.com and Yahoo Sports. B has reliable sources too and confirms the five field goals and 17 points, but the visible snippets omit the exact milestone total and prior-record context, so it is less sufficient for a precise answer.
